name: Healthy-adult repeated plasmapheresis aging-biomarker study
summary: Prospective case-crossover study of healthy plasma donors aged 40 to 60, testing repeated plasmapheresis without young plasma or albumin replacement against biochemical and epigenetic aging readouts.
population: Healthy blood donors aged 40 to 60 years

trial_details.horizon_note: Publication results are staged in this repair, although ClinicalTrials.gov did not have registry-posted results in the June 9, 2026 API view.
trial_details.why_it_matters: This is direct healthy-adult plasmapheresis biomarker evidence and a limiting counterpoint to favorable TPE multi-omics results.
